text: You scheduled the meeting with Robert at ten o’clock.
Today Robert comes to your office, and you welcome him as a guest.
Would you like to sit down?
Hello Robert, welcome to our office. I am happy to see you.
Thank you, Karina. It is very nice to be here as your visitor.
Please have a seat. Would you like a coffee or a glass of water?
A glass of water, please. Thank you very much.
Of course. Let me introduce my colleague. We can go to the meeting room now.
Wonderful. I am ready. Thank you for the warm welcome.
Would you like a coffee or water?
Thank you for coming. Have a good day.

Good morning. Welcome to our office. My name is Karina Macedo, and I am the host today. Robert, our guest, will arrive at ten. When he arrives at the reception, please call me. I want to welcome him, offer him a seat, and bring him a coffee or a glass of water. After that, I will introduce him to my colleague. Please keep the meeting room ready. Thank you very much.

Hello, this is Robert. I am almost at your office. I am very happy to visit you today. I am the guest for the ten o'clock meeting with Karina. When I arrive at the reception, I will ask for her. I would like a glass of water, please, because it is a warm day. I am ready to meet your colleague too. See you soon at the reception.

First, Robert arrived at the reception and Karina welcomed him. Then she offered him a seat and asked him to sit down. Next, she asked if he would like a coffee or a glass of water. After that, she introduced Robert to her colleague. Finally, they walked together to the meeting room.
Here is a glass of water.
Would you like a coffee or water?
Thank you for coming. Have a good day.
